statement: For grouping G=quotient_complex_profile_pointwise, prove |sum_i_in_G w_i Q_i(1/n)/Q_id(1/n)| <= C n Lambda0^20 ||htilde||^2 q^A n^(-sigma+o(1)) by signed cancellation at x=1/n.
falsifiable_hypotheses: paper-native; evaluated at x=1/n; denominator safe; no absolute fixed-stratum variation inside G
beta_formula: beta=(2 kappa - A) eta + sigma - D
pivot_rule: If proof requires sum_i |w_i Q_i| or coefficient total variation inside fixed strata, pivot to coefficient/signed variation.
